title: Deepen architecture graph beyond directory containment in v0.2
context: Self-graph is 12 nodes / 11 contains-edges at confidence 0.65 - it locates the apps but expresses no service, dependency, or data-flow semantics.
decision: Treat import/manifest-derived edges (api->db, worker->redis, web->api) as a v0.2 architecture-spine candidate.
tradeoffs: deeper analysis costs scanner complexity; directory graph stays as the fallback layer
consequences: graph becomes decision-grade instead of navigational

title: Fix /health Redis degradation as first post-v0.1 runtime task
context: Alpha self-run showed GET /health raises 500 when Redis is down; on teevee-1 with Redis present it was healthy, so the defect only appears in degraded environments - exactly where a health endpoint matters most.
decision: Queue a small post-v0.1 package to catch the Redis ConnectionError in health() and report redis:false with HTTP 200.
tradeoffs: 200-with-flags requires callers to inspect the body, but keeps db/api status visible when only redis is degraded
consequences: health endpoint becomes usable for partial-outage triage
